tips_en: I recommend starting with MinT because its systems-level approach to scalable LoRA training and serving addresses the infrastructure bottleneck that underpins practical deployment of large model populations. AnyFlow and MMProLong tackle complementary algorithmic challenges in efficient video generation and long-context vision-language modeling, and together all three papers illustrate how efficiency innovations across the systems-algorithm boundary are pushing frontier models toward real-world usability.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读 MinT，因为其从系统层面解决了大规模 LoRA 训练与服务的瓶颈，为海量专用模型的实际部署奠定了基础。AnyFlow 与 MMProLong 分别在高效视频生成和长上下文视觉语言建模的算法层面取得突破，三篇论文共同展示了系统与算法协同优化如何推动前沿模型走向实用。
